mapper.select: SELECT * FROM review_result WHERE submission_id = #{submissionId} LIMIT 1
SELECT rr.* FROM review_result rr INNER JOIN submission s ON rr.submission_id = s.id INNER JOIN work w ON s.work_id = w.id WHERE w.track_id = #{competitionTrackId} ORDER BY rr.final_score DESC
SELECT * FROM review_result WHERE award_level = #{awardLevel} ORDER BY final_score DESC

SELECT rr.*, t.team_name as teamName, t.team_code as teamCode, s.submission_code as submissionCode, w.work_name as workName, ct.id as competitionTrackId, ct.track_name as trackName FROM review_result rr INNER JOIN submission s ON rr.submission_id = s.id INNER JOIN work w ON s.work_id = w.id INNER JOIN team t ON rr.team_id = t.id INNER JOIN competition_track ct ON w.track_id = ct.id WHERE ct.competition_id = #{competitionId} ORDER BY rr.final_score DESC

SELECT rr.*, t.team_name as teamName, t.team_code as teamCode, s.submission_code as submissionCode, w.work_name as workName FROM review_result rr INNER JOIN submission s ON rr.submission_id = s.id INNER JOIN work w ON s.work_id = w.id INNER JOIN team t ON rr.team_id = t.id WHERE w.track_id = #{competitionTrackId} AND rr.award_level IS NOT NULL ORDER BY rr.final_score DESC
